applicability_boundary.claimed_scope: Gaussian 2D latent + Gaussian OU transition + canonical nonlinear observation mixing families.
applicability_boundary.not_claimed: This sweep does not claim non-Gaussian latent coverage, non-Gaussian transition noise, or non-canonical mixing closure.
